name: memloom
description: 忆织 (Memloom) — 个人知识管理与间隔复习系统。自动从 AI 对话中提取知识，生成结构化卡片，并通过费曼学习法进行高效复习。
description_en: Memloom — Personal knowledge management and spaced repetition system. Extracts knowledge from AI conversations, creates structured cards, and enables effective review through Feynman technique.
